# Omarchy Lazygit Theme Sync

Automatic lazygit theme synchronization for Omarchy.

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/prepin/omarchy-lazygit-theme-sync.git
cd omarchy-lazygit-theme-sync
./install.sh
```

## Features

- Automatic theme sync when changing Omarchy themes
- 17 pre-configured lazygit themes
- Theme generation from Omarchy colors.toml
- Live reload via wrapper script

## Usage

After installation, lazygit automatically uses your Omarchy theme:

```bash
omarchy-theme-set catppuccin
lazygit  # Uses catppuccin theme
```

## Requirements

- [lazygit](https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit)
- [Omarchy](https://omarchy.org/)
